programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Severide and Herrmann clash over office space; Boden looks at Pelham's past as he considers making him permanent; Gallo's resentment of Pelham comes to a head; Brett and Ritter force Violet to confront her true feelings for Gallo.

programme.desc: A video of Casey from the roof rescue goes viral; Mouch sets up a Little Free Library at Firehouse 51; Herrmann breaks protocol.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A search mission for three women missing in Yosemite Park turns to a murder investigation when two are discovered in the trunk of their burned out car.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: Police search for the killer of an elderly upscale Toronto couple.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A single woman and her two young sons believe they have found a perfect new apartment, but their overbearing landlord and neighbor soon turns their idyllic situation into a living hell of arguments and intimidation that finally ends in bloodshed.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: When an unidentified burned corpse is found in a field, state-of-the-art forensics is turned to.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One attempts to contain a radioactive threat with the help of firefighters, paramedics and the military.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: Stella Kidd returns to Firehouse 51; the team must work together to put out a potassium fire in a tunnel; after that incident, Ritter begins to worry about a young cop who witnessed the fiery death of a truck driver.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: On a call with Station 37, a firefighter is struck by a power line and decides to lash out after her injury; Brett is visited by Scott and Amelia; Violet gets a surprise envelope; the rest of 51 enters a contest.

programme.title: The Gathering
programme.desc: The rivalry between elite gymnasts Kelly and Jessica turns toxic when Kelly is selected for the national squad; Kelly's father Paul is haunted by an accuser from his past, and Kelly becomes jealous of Jessica's growing attraction to Adam.

programme.desc: Chin Gigante is released from prison and seeks to excise Joe Colombo from the Commission.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Once-friendly neighbors on a mountain road become sworn enemies after one family calls police about a theft -- violating the unspoken tradition of leaving authorities out of disputes; years of conflict finally culminate with shots fired.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
programme.desc: A serial rapist stalks elderly women for nearly 20 years before escalating to murder.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team rushes to save a woman when a disturbed man holds her hostage outside an office building.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead takes heat for making an unauthorized move to treat his pregnant patient; Choi becomes personally invested when treating a homeless veteran; Rhodes and Bekker deal with a patient who desperately needs a liver transplant.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Manning and her three-year-old patient are trapped in a helicopter as the toddler's stats decline; Charles isn't sure Choi's alcoholic patient with liver failure has quite hit rock bottom.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead hides the theft of his gun from a suspicious Manning; tensions are still high between Connor and Bekker, who take a risk operating on an HIV-positive patient; Hank breaks down when he sees a patient from his past.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Connor, who is in hot water with the hospital's Oversight Committee, handles a gunshot victim who has unexpected ties to Halstead; Maggie feels guilty about the return of a former patient; Charles has an awkward first date.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: After witnessing a pickup truck plow through a street fair, Natalie and Maggie must make tough decisions on the fly; at the hospital, doctors and nurses are on high alert with the influx of patients; Dr. Charles' ex-wife comes to town with news.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: Halstead treats a woman on the verge of freezing to death; Dr. Charles' ex-wife receives some concerning news; Choi handles a lymphoma patient with viral meningitis and a complicated family; Manning makes a house call.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: When a car unexpectedly smashes through the ambulance bay doors, Dr. Choi makes some difficult decisions in an effort to save a worker trapped beneath the wreckage and April, who's also in danger.
